heroHeadline: Post-Assad Syria: HTS Consolidates Transitional Rule
heroSubtitle: Four months after the December 2024 regime collapse, Ahmad al-Sharaa's transitional government works to unify Syria's fractured governance — while refugees weigh return and Israel, Turkey, and the SDF test the new order.
footerNote: Data sourced from official reports, major outlets, UN agencies, and institutional analyses. Historical events drawn from established academic consensus.
